distractors.off_target_set: Questions with verifiable grounded answers; low-stakes reversible decisions where guessing is acceptable; brainstorming/hypothetical framing; meta-questions about circle of competence
distractors.description: Items where the answer is checkable, stakes are low, or the framing explicitly invites speculation

calibration_exception.reason: Abstention/calibration surface intentionally measures confidence alignment; wider range accounts for ceiling effects on easy items and floor effects on unanswerable items

decision_gate.elevate: primary_delta_pp >= 5 AND paired_test_p < 0.05 AND replication_delta_pp >= 5 AND replication_paired_test_p < 0.05 AND replication_direction_matches_primary AND calibration_error_reduction >= 0.05
decision_gate.directional_not_replicated: primary_delta_pp >= 5 AND paired_test_p < 0.05 AND (replication_delta_pp < 5 OR replication_paired_test_p >= 0.05 OR replication_direction_opposite)
